mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, title, content, is_read, related_id, related_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
SELECT FROM notification ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, is_read, related_id, related_type, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{relatedId}, #{relatedType}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET user_id = #{userId}, type = #{type}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_read = #{isRead}, related_id = #{relatedId}, related_type = #{relatedType}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = TRUE, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
